sidebar.subtitle: Frontend architecture, design systems and product focus.
sidebar.degreeCore: Core: Java, Python, JS, SQL, Android & Cloud Computing.

automind.h1: Drive the frontend of the next generation of AUTOLOAD, a modular SaaS product built from the ground up in Next.js 14, React 18 and TypeScript on a .NET 8 backend (SignalR, multi-tenant PostgreSQL), replacing the legacy on-premise .NET + Vue system and cutting new-client install time by 70%.
automind.h2: Cut the frontend build pipeline from 12 to 4 minutes by fixing a Node + Tailwind CSS misconfiguration, speeding up the team's deploy cycle by 3x.
automind.h3: Created and maintain @automind/react-components, a design system built on Radix UI, Storybook and Chromatic that standardizes the UI across 2 products and eliminated component rewrites between frontend teams.
automind.h4: Implemented Vitest and Playwright in the Azure DevOps pipeline with full coverage of critical flows (unit + E2E), preventing regressions before release via smoke tests on PR and full regression in CI.
automind.h5: Run daily code reviews, mentor around 5 junior developers and write specs and requirements documentation alongside product stakeholders.

branddi.h1: Architected an end-to-end infringement management platform that serves 300+ global brands and processes 6M sponsored ads and 2,500 unfair competition cases per month, with a NestJS/REST core integrated with Pipefy via GraphQL.
branddi.h2: Cut report dashboard response times from 7 minutes to milliseconds with server-side downsampling, streamed responses and lazy-loaded time series.
branddi.h3: Built Go workers on RabbitMQ that process crawled data from 3 marketplaces and search engines in real time and feed the detection pipeline that protects over R$250M in annual institutional CPC.
branddi.h4: Built the observability stack from scratch (Papertrail, health checks, downtime alerts) and cut failure-to-fix time to near-zero, with the team notified at the moment of each incident.
branddi.h5: Led code reviews, defined the team's unit testing strategy and automated AWS deploys via GitHub Actions to standardize the project's CI/CD flow.

eisa.h1: Automated the E2E test suite for VIVO systems (90M+ subscribers) in Selenium WebDriver, Cucumber and Ruby, with coverage of critical provisioning flows and full regression before each release.
eisa.h2: Validated asynchronous flows in Apache Kafka and ran complex PL/SQL (Oracle) scripts on Linux to isolate bugs in data pipelines that affected billing.
eisa.h3: Led the migration of the legacy monorepo from TortoiseSVN to GitLab, moving around 20 engineers onto a modern version-control workflow and enabling CI/CD pipelines.

parallel.h1: Built full-stack features in React and Node.js for a sales platform, focused on UX and funnel conversion improvements.
parallel.h2: Created auxiliary Python APIs and managed MySQL data persistence for internal product workflows.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.agentSkillsDesc: Modular skills for generative agents — each skill is self-contained with docs, rules and references.
skills.wigDesc: Personalized feed with geo + affinity scoring, Redis caching and cron-driven push notifications. Stripe subscriptions, Supabase Auth with RLS, rate limiting via proxy and standalone PWA.
skills.jacosegDesc: Conversion-focused landing page with responsive web design. Internal dashboard with Prisma + PostgreSQL multi-branch, NextAuth with RBAC, server actions with Zod validation and drag-and-drop tables.
skills.biancaDesc: Custom landing page with serif typography, Framer Motion animations and a layout designed to convey warmth. Firebase Auth, reCAPTCHA-protected form and email delivery via Nodemailer.
skills.portfolioDesc: SSG with ISR, Server Components with Suspense and resilient fetching (Promise.allSettled + timeout). Build-time PDF CV, open source via GitHub API, command palette (cmdk), theme toggle with View Transitions API and SoundCloud player via Widget API.
